MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem William Rauch; the Parties stipulated and not recited on the record; a Judgment pursuant to stip. was submitted for signature; terms and conditions: possession of the premises 520 South Van Ness Av. #389, SF CA; vacate on or before 5pm on Oct. 1, 2002; if deft. does not vacate deft. will pay back rent of $1635.00 and u.d. damages of $13.63 per day from Aug. 1, 2002 through Oct. 1, 2002; along with costs of $191.00; total judgment of $2,671.06;
